summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Yellow Pecora marketplace app. Backend APIs working well (92.9% success), frontend fully functional with all required features including Italian interface, Yellow Pecora branding, carousels, filters, and navigation.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 when creating items
minor_bugs.impact: Very minor - item creation works correctly, just wrong status code

auth_limitations.issue: Cannot fully test OAuth flow without real Google auth
auth_limitations.impact: Upload modal and authenticated features testing limited

console_warnings.impact: No functional impact - app works correctly

passed_tests: Homepage loads with Yellow Pecora banner and mascot
Nuovi Arrivi carousel displays items correctly
Trending carousel displays items correctly
Collezionisti vicino a te section displays mock users
Explore page loads with filters sidebar and items grid
Category filters work correctly (Carte filter tested)
Active filters display when filters applied
Item detail page loads with gallery, info, and CTAs
Profile page loads with tabs and user information
Search functionality redirects to explore with query
All navigation between pages works smoothly
Italian interface throughout the app
Yellow accent colors and branding consistent
All CTAs (Proponi Scambio, Compra, Desideri) are clickable
Backend API /api/items returns 12 mock items
Backend API /api/items/{id} returns single item details
Backend API /api/users/{id} returns user profile with items
Backend API filtering works (category, transaction_type, search)
Backend API auth endpoints work correctly (401 when unauthenticated)
Backend API item creation works when authenticated
